heroDescription.processed: A community workshop where makers, tinkerers, artists, and inventors come together to create. Access professional-grade tools, learn new skills, and bring your ideas to life.
heroDescription.summary: A community workshop where makers, tinkerers, artists, and inventors come together to create. Access professional-grade tools, learn new skills, and bring your ideas to life.

ctaDescription.processed: Tour the space, meet our community, and discover what you can create. First-time visitors get a free day pass to explore all our workshops.
ctaDescription.summary: Tour the space, meet our community, and discover what you can create. First-time visitors get a free day pass to explore all our workshops.
